subject: Swift triggers 1186294-1186304 are not astrophysical transients
body:
P.A. Evans (U. Leicester) reports on behalf of the Swift team.

Further to GCN Circ. 34502, the subsequent BAT triggers: 1186294, 1186295, 1186296, 1186302 and 1186304 were not caused by astrophysical transients but arose due to the star tracker loss of lock. These events should be disregarded.
